title: Immersive Weathering + Nature's Delight: Bark Stripping
description:
Lightweight Data Pack for adding bark stripping for all Nature's Delight wood types on Farmer's Delight cutting board.

Only use this if you have Farmer's Delight, Nature's Spirit and Immersive Weathering installed. Nature's Delight is highly recommended!
body:
Using Immersive Weathering, Nature's Spirit and Farmer's Delight?
This lightweight Data Pack adds all **Immersive Weathering** barks to the **Cutting Board**.
